news.headline: Culp, Inc. reported $49.5M net sales for Q4 2024, down 19.4%. Mattress fabrics -16.1%, Upholstery fabrics -22.6%.
news.summary: Culp, Inc. (NYSE: CULP) announced its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year which concluded on April 28, 2024. In the fourth quarter of fiscal 2024, the company recorded a net sales figure of $49.5 million, marking a 19.4 percent decrease from the same period last year. Within this, sales of mattress fabrics experienced a 16.1 percent decline and upholstery fabrics sales dropped by 22.6 percent. The company reported a loss from operations in the same quarter.

news.headline: Nike reports $51.4 billion in revenues for fiscal 2024, up 1%. Q4 revenues: $12.6 billion, down 2%. Direct revenues: $5.1 billion, down 8%.
news.summary: In its fiscal 2024 fourth quarter and full year ended on May 31, 2024, NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) from Beaverton, Ore., disclosed its financial results. The full-year revenues amounted to $51.4 billion, showing a slight increase from the prior year's $51.2 billion, representing a 1 percent rise on a currency-neutral basis. Fourth-quarter revenues reached $12.6 billion, reflecting a 2 percent decline on a reported basis but remaining flat on a currency-neutral basis. NIKE Direct revenues for the fourth quarter totaled $5.1 billion, marking an 8 percent decrease on a reported basis.

news.headline: Chatham Lodging Trust to hold Q2 2024 earnings call on Aug 2, 2024 in West Palm Beach, Florida.
news.summary: Chatham Lodging Trust has disclosed that its second quarter earnings call for 2024 is scheduled to take place on Friday, August 2nd. This announcement was made from West Palm Beach, Florida.

news.headline: World Kinect Corp (NYSE: WKC) to hold Q2 2024 earnings call on July 25 at 5:00 p.m. ET. Results to be released post-market close. Visit ir.worldkinect.com for webcast.
news.summary: Miami-based World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) is holding a conference call on Thursday, July 25, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. ET to review the company's performance in the second quarter of 2024. The results will be released after the market closes on the same day. To join the discussion and view forward-looking insights, participants can tune into the live webcast on the company's website at ir.worldkinect.com/events. World Kinect encourages all interested parties to engage in this interactive session with its management team.

news.headline: WesBanco (Nasdaq: WSBC) declares quarterly cash dividend on 6.75% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock.
news.summary: Today, in Wheeling, West Virginia, WesBanco, Inc. (Nasdaq:WSBC), a diversified bank holding company operating in multiple states, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend for the holders of its 6.75% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock.

news.headline: Tenorshare releases iCarefone Recorder iOS app for recording and managing phone calls in multiple languages.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in New York, Tenorshare, a prominent provider of software solutions, revealed the introduction of iCareFone Recorder: Call Record. This innovative iOS application aims to revolutionize the way individuals record and handle phone conversations. The app is accessible in various languages, providing users with a seamless experience.

news.headline: HitPaw releases Voice Changer V1.9.0 with AI technology, redefining sound transformation. Another step into the future.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, HitPaw, a leading software technology company, introduced its latest software, the HitPaw Voice Changer. This innovative tool promises to revolutionize sound manipulation, providing users with the ability to experiment with limitless possibilities. The software can be accessed at https://www.hitpaw.com/voice-changer.html.

news.headline: Kite Realty Group Trust releases annual Corporate Responsibility Report focusing on ESG practices, goals, and initiatives.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Kite Realty Group Trust (NYSE: KRG) unveiled its latest Corporate Responsibility Report, highlighting its environmental, social, and governance (ESG) strategies. This annual report delves into the company's ESG practices, policies, and progress. It showcases key metrics, advancements, and case studies demonstrating KRG's commitment to sustainable business practices.

news.headline: Ashford Hospitality Trust sells One Ocean Resort in Atlantic Beach, Florida; 193-room property sold for debt repayment.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AHT) disclosed the completion of the sale of the 193-room One Ocean Resort in Atlantic Beach, Florida. The company confirmed that all the funds acquired from this sale will be allocated towards debt repayment.

news.headline: $80,000 in college scholarships awarded by California Water Service Group to support local communities.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, which is a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.5%. The report further stated that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter, exceeding analysts' expectations. Additionally, the stock market saw a 3% increase following this positive economic news. Experts are optimistic about the future economic growth and job market stability.

news.headline: Cousins Properties to report Q2 earnings on July 25, 2024, with conference call on July 26, 2024.
news.summary: Atlanta-based real estate company Cousins Properties (NYSE:CUZ) is scheduled to unveil its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on July 25, 2024, after the markets close. Following this, on July 26, 2024, the company will conduct its earnings conference call to discuss the performance. news.headline: Law firm investigating Axos Financial for securities law violations in June 2024. Stock symbol: AX. Shareholders affected.

(NYSE: AX). The investigation revolves around potential misconduct related to the Company.

news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Stifel Financial Corp. (NYSE: SF) released key operating results for May 31, 2024 to offer investors important performance insights. It's crucial to note that these metrics provide limited data and may not directly correlate with earnings.

Those interested can join the call and webcast through the provided details.

news.headline: Michigan-based Lineage Inc. files for IPO seeking $3B and valuing company at $30B. Estimated raise of $3.5B through IPO.
news.summary: Correction has been made to the founding timeline of Lineage Inc. as presented in an updated article. The temperature-controlled storage and logistics firm recently submitted paperwork for its initial public offering (IPO), becoming the most recent Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) to enter the public stock market. A report from Crain’s Detroit Business announced this development on Thursday. Headquartered in Novi, Michigan, Lineage aims to raise $3 billion through the IPO, potentially leading to a valuation exceeding $30 billion. Renaissance Capital projected that the company could gather approximately $3.5 billion from the IPO. Notably, Lineage currently boasts 482...

news.headline: LuxUrban Hotels appoints Patrick McNamee to board of directors. Brian Ferdinand resigns from board.
news.summary: Brian Ferdinand has officially resigned from the board of the company. This announcement comes as a surprise to many, as Ferdinand has been serving on the board for a significant period of time. His resignation will leave a vacancy that the company will need to fill in the upcoming board meeting. Ferdinand's departure will impact the board's composition, as he was a key member contributing to important decisions. The company's board will now consist of X members following this resignation. Ferdinand's absence will be felt in future board meetings and strategic planning sessions.

news.headline: Discover Financial Services (NYSE: DFS) to release 2nd quarter 2024 earnings on July 17, 2024, conference call on July 18, 2024 at 7:00 am CT.
news.summary: Discover Financial Services, listed on NYSE as DFS, is set to announce its Q2 2024 financial results post-market closure on July 17, 2024. The earnings report will be accessible via Discover's Investor Relations site. Following this, a conference call has been scheduled for July 18, 2024, at 7:00 a.m. CT, limited to prepared remarks, to discuss results, outlook, and other pertinent topics. For further details, visit https://investorrelations.discover.com.

news.headline: Aethlon Medical reports fiscal year ended March 31, 2024 with $9.1 million cash balance. Updates include approval for clinical trials using Hemopurifier in cancer patients. Financials show $12.2 million net loss for the year. Call scheduled for June 27, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Aethlon Medical reported its financial results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2024, with a cash balance of about $9.1 million as of June 25, 2024. The company is advancing the Hemopurifier, a blood filtration system for cancer and infectious diseases. They received approval for a clinical trial in Australia to study the Hemopurifier's effects in cancer patients on anti-PD-1 treatment. The company is also conducting a COVID-19 trial in India. Despite a net loss of $12.2 million in FY2024, the company's financials show operating expenses of $12.6 million, with increases in payroll costs offset by decreases in other areas. The conference call to discuss these updates will be held on June 27, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. ET.

news.headline: View Bloomberg Equality for insights on the 2024 US Election.
Biopic 'The Apprentice' about Donald J. Trump close to distribution deal despite backlash from his allies.
news.summary: Critics have heavily slammed "The Apprentice," a fictionalized account detailing the background of Donald J. Trump. The show has received backlash from the ex-president and his supporters.

news.headline: Exro Technologies receives UL Certification for Cell Driver™ Energy Storage and launches Cellex Energy Inc.
news.summary: Exro Technologies Inc., a prominent clean-technology company based in Calgary, Alberta, has announced significant developments on June 27, 2024. Listed on the TSX as EXRO and OTCQB as EXROF, the company specializes in proprietary propulsion system technology for e-mobility and exclusive battery control technology for stationary energy solutions.

news.headline: ESLS market to grow by $1.64 billion from 2024-2028, with CAGR of 15.69% due to in-store technology implementation.
news.summary: According to a report by Technavio released on June 27, 2024, the electronic shelf label (ESL) market is projected to increase by approximately USD 1641 million between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 15.69% during this period. This growth is attributed to the widespread adoption of in-store technologies...

news.headline: Dermody Properties starts construction on LogistiCenter at Pleasant Prairie. WestRock, leader in sustainable packaging, signs deal.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Pleasant Prairie, Wisconsin, Dermody Properties, a private equity investment management company specializing in national logistics real estate, shared news of WestRock signing a deal. WestRock, a renowned global sustainable packaging leader, solidified the agreement.

news.headline: Export-Import Bank approves $50 million funding for ESS Tech, Inc. to expand production capacity of long-duration energy storage systems in Oregon.
news.summary: A leading manufacturer of long-duration energy storage systems (LDES), ESS Tech, Inc. (ESS), based in Wilsonville, Oregon, recently secured a financing package worth $50 million from the Export-Import Bank of the United States (EXIM). Approved under the Make More in America Initiative, this funding aims to support ESS' expansion of production capacity in Wilsonville to meet increasing worldwide demand for their innovative energy storage solutions. The financing signifies a significant boost for ESS as they strive to enhance their capabilities and cater to the rising global market needs.

news.headline: Enact secures $90 million in excess of loss reinsurance coverage from reinsurers as part of diversified program.
news.summary: Acquiring around $90 million of excess of loss reinsurance coverage from a group of reinsurers.

news.headline: Dynavax begins Phase 1/2 trial for new shingles vaccine; first participant dosed.
news.summary: A biopharmaceutical company, Dynavax Technologies Corporation (Nasdaq: DVAX), based in Emeryville, California, disclosed that the initial participant in a Phase 1/2 clinical trial has been administered the dose. This trial marks a significant step in the company's development and commercialization of groundbreaking vaccines. The event took place on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Skechers (NYSE: SKX) to reveal Q2 2024 financial results on July 25, following market close. Execs to discuss in conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Skechers USA, Inc. (NYSE: SKX), a leading global footwear company known for its comfort technology, has revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2024 on Thursday, July 25th, after the markets shut. The post-market event will see David Weinberg, the Chief Operating Officer, and John Vandemore, the Chief Financial Officer, discuss the numbers in a conference call scheduled for around 4:30 p.m. ET / 1:30 p.m. PT on the same day. The call will offer insights into the company's recent financial standing and future outlook.

news.headline: Paradigm urges European regulators to reconsider MEV handling, warns against industry repercussions without alternative solutions.
news.summary: The venture capitalist firm expressed concerns about ESMA's handling of crypto market abuse, warning that their current approach could potentially harm the industry. They did not offer any alternative solutions to address the issue.

news.headline: Pinstripes reports $36.2 million in revenue for fiscal Q4 2024, up by 5.9% from previous year.
news.summary: Northbrook, Illinois-based Pinstripes Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PNST), a leading experiential dining and entertainment brand featuring bistro, bowling, and bocce, released its financial outcomes for the fiscal year that concluded on April 28, 2024. In the fourth quarter of the fiscal year 2024, the company experienced a significant 5.9% rise in total revenue, reaching $36.2 million compared to the same period in the previous year. Notably, food and beverage revenues also saw an increase. Pinstripes is renowned for its unique blend of dining and entertainment offerings, as well as its private event spaces.

news.headline: Federal Reserve set to announce annual bank stress test results on Jun 26, dictating large banks' capital needs and shareholder payouts. Last year, JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, Morgan Stanley, Bank of America, and Citigroup raised dividends. Stress tests evaluate banks' resilience under adverse scenarios.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve will announce its annual bank health check results, known as the 'stress test', on Jun 26. This test assesses how much capital large banks need to endure potential sector turmoil. Last year, banks like JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, Morgan Stanley, Bank of America, and Citigroup raised their quarterly dividends. These stress tests have been mandated since 2009 under the Dodd-Frank financial law to evaluate banks' capital adequacy, liquidity, and risk management under adverse scenarios like recession or asset price decline. This year's results will determine dividend payouts and share repurchases for banks.

news.headline: Gain Therapeutics, Inc. names Gene Mack as Interim CEO in recent move.
Coinbase advisor to support Biden’s reelection campaign. Keisha Lance Bottoms may advise on crypto, after discussing digital assets in Atlanta.
news.summary: Keisha Lance Bottoms' potential involvement in advising the campaign on cryptocurrencies remains uncertain following her discussion on digital assets in Atlanta. This occurred the day prior to the presidential debate, where she shared insights on the subject.

news.headline: DuPont declares $0.38/share quarterly dividend on Common Stock, payable on Sept. 16, 2024.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on June 27, 2024, DuPont disclosed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $0.38 per share on the Common Stock (with a par value of $0.01 per share). This dividend is payable on September 16, 2024.

news.headline: Natural Grocers CFO Todd Dissinger to retire on Dec 31, 2024. He will continue to serve until then.
news.summary: Today, on June 27, 2024, in Lakewood, Colorado, Natural Grocers by Vitamin Cottage, Inc. (NYSE: NGVC) disclosed that Todd Dissinger, their Chief Financial Officer, plans to retire on December 31, 2024. Despite this decision, he will retain his position as Chief Financial Officer until the specified date.

news.headline: AAR honored as one of America's Greatest Workplaces 2024 by Newsweek for employee satisfaction. Wood Dale, Illinois, June 27, 2024. NYSE: AIR.
news.summary: AAR CORP. has been acknowledged for its dedication to enhancing employee contentment, achieved through its focus on fostering a people-centered atmosphere, offering competitive pay, and providing avenues for career growth. The award, received on June 27, 2024, in Wood Dale, Illinois, highlights the company's efforts in ensuring employee satisfaction. AAR CORP. (NYSE: AIR), a major player in the industry, has been recognized for its commitment to employee welfare and growth opportunities.

news.headline: Financial Trust Asset Management listed on PSN Top Guns List for best performing strategies in 1Q 2024, published by Zephyr.
news.summary: Financial Trust Asset Management, based in Boca Raton, Florida, was recently recognized in the Quarterly PSN Top Guns List published by Zephyr. This list highlights the top performers in separate accounts, managed accounts, and managed ETF strategies. The announcement was made on June 27, 2024. Financial Trust Asset Management's exceptional performance earned them a spot on this prestigious list, showcasing their expertise in financial management. This recognition underscores the firm's success in the industry.

news.headline: Boardwalktech Software Corp reported fourth-quarter and annual fiscal 2024 financial results.
news.summary: Cupertino, California - Boardwalktech Software Corp. (TSXV: BWLK) (OTCQB: BWLKF) announced its fiscal year 2024 financial results. The company, known for its digital ledger platform and enterprise software solutions, reported positive numbers for the year ending in June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Abcourt completes last part of private unit placement, raises $627,570.
news.summary: A recent report stated that the unemployment rate in the United States has decreased to 3.9%, with a total of 6.6 million people currently unemployed. Additionally, the economy added 943,000 jobs in the past month, marking a significant increase from previous months. This surge in employment is attributed to various sectors including manufacturing, construction, and professional services. Despite these positive trends, experts are cautious about the potential impact of rising inflation and ongoing supply chain disruptions on the job market in the coming months. Overall, the improving job market reflects a positive trajectory for the U.S. economy amidst ongoing challenges.

news.headline: Kirkland's announces results of 2024 Annual Meeting. Ann Joyce named Board Chair. Held on June 26, 2024. Nasdaq: KIRK.
news.summary: Ann Joyce has been appointed as the Board Chair in Nashville, Tennessee on June 27, 2024. Kirkland's, Inc. (Nasdaq: KIRK), also known as Kirkland's Home, revealed the outcomes of its 2024 Annual Meeting of Shareholders that took place on June 26, 2024. Kirkland's is a specialty retailer that focuses on home décor and furnishings.

news.headline: FRC President Tony Perkins criticizes U.S. Supreme Court for not backing Idaho's abortion law in Idaho v. U.S.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Tony Perkins, President of the Family Research Council, issued a statement reacting to the U.S. Supreme Court's decision regarding Idaho v. U.S. where the Court did not support Idaho's right to protect the unborn. The case revolved around a challenge to an Idaho law.

news.headline: Elicio Therapeutics (Nasdaq: ELTX) announces a public offering of common stock and warrants, subject to market conditions.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Elicio Therapeutics, Inc. announced the initiation of an underwritten public offering of its shares of common stock and accompanying common warrants. The offering includes pre-funded warrants for certain investors who opt for them. Elicio is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing immunotherapies for cancer treatment. The public offering's completion and final size and terms are subject to market conditions, with no guarantees on the outcome. The common stock, pre-funded warrants, and accompanying common warrants are all offered by Elicio. Elicio Therapeutics is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol “ELTX”.

news.headline: Prairie Provident extends senior credit facility to July 31, 2024, defers interest payments, in talks for further extension.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on June 27, 2024, Prairie Provident Resources Inc. disclosed an extension of the maturity date for its senior secured credit facility, known as the "First Lien Loan," until July 31, 2024. In addition, all interest payment responsibilities related to the loan have been deferred. The Company, listed under TSX as PPR, is currently in negotiations with its lender for a potential additional extension of the First Lien Loan.

news.headline: Workhorse partners with Surefitters to offer new upfit program for commercial EVs, expanding product line.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, American technology company Workhorse Group Inc. (Nasdaq: WKHS) revealed a collaboration with Surefitters from Rosemount, MN, to introduce a new upfit program. This initiative aims to provide various upfit options for Workhorse's medium-duty commercial EVs, as part of their commitment to advancing zero-emission commercial vehicles.

news.headline: Brookfield Renewable to host Q2 2024 results conference call on August 2, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Brookfield Renewable announced their plans to host the Second Quarter 2024 Conference Call and Webcast on August 2, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The purpose of this event is to discuss the results and business initiatives of the company. Brookfield Renewable can be found under the ticker symbols NYSE: BEP, BEPC and TSX: BEP.UN, BEPC.

news.headline: Acasti reached 50% enrollment in Phase 3 STRIVE-ON trial, aiming for completion by late 2024 to early 2025. NDA submission expected in 1H 2025.
news.summary: The company expects to finish enrolling patients in the STRIVE-ON trial between late 2024 and early 2025. They are on schedule for a potential submission of the New Drug Application (NDA) in the first half of the calendar year 2025.

news.headline: Avadel Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: AVDL) will join Russell 3000® Index on July 1, 2024, as per announcement.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Avadel Pharmaceuticals plc (Nasdaq: AVDL) revealed its inclusion in the Russell 3000® Index following the 2024 Russell US Indexes annual reconstitution. This change will take effect on July 1, 2024, at the opening of US equity markets. The preliminary list of additions was shared on May 24, 2024. Avadel Pharmaceutical plc, a biopharmaceutical company, aims to revolutionize medicines to enhance lives. The company's transition to the Russell 3000® Index signifies a significant milestone and potential opportunities for growth and visibility in the market.

news.headline: Verizon adds Caroline A. Litchfield, Merck CFO, to its Board effective Oct. 1, 2024. Announcement made on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Verizon Communications Inc revealed today the appointment of Caroline A. Litchfield, currently serving as the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Merck & Co., Inc., to join their Board of Directors, starting from October 1, 2024. Caroline A. Litchfield's inclusion in the Verizon Board of Directors comes as a significant addition, bringing diverse expertise to the company. Verizon, a prominent player in the communication industry, is listed on NYSE and Nasdaq under the ticker symbol VZ. This strategic move is aimed at enhancing the board's capabilities with the valuable experience and leadership that Caroline A. Litchfield offers.

news.headline: Stocks rise slightly with Dow closing higher as investors anticipate Friday's inflation report.
Horizon Bancorp will hold conference call at 7:30am CT on July 25, 2024 to discuss second quarter results.
